basic_details.job_title: AMU Radiotherapy Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Aligarh Muslim University (AMU) has published the Radiotherapy Technician Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. 499/RT/2026 on its official website https://www.amu.ac.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Radiotherapy Technician position on a temporary basis. Candidates who meet the prescribed age criteria (as per the official notification) and hold a Bachelor of Radiation Therapy Technology (BRTT)/B.Sc. in Radiation Therapy or a Diploma in Radiation Therapy with 3 years' relevant experience are eligible to apply offline up to 30 June 2026. Candidates can easily access the official noti

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Radiation Therapy Technology (BRTT) / B.Sc. in Radiation Therapy OR Diploma in Radiation Therapy with 3 years' experience.
qualification.details: Radiotherapy Technician: Bachelor of Radiation Therapy Technology (BRTT) / B.Sc. in Radiation Therapy OR Diploma in Radiation Therapy with 3 years' experience relevant field after obtaining certificate.

salary_details.details: Fixed salary of Rs. 19350/- per month.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AMU Radiotherapy Technician Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download AMU Radiotherapy Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download AMU Radiotherapy Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AMU Radiotherapy Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Radiotherapy Technician post at Aligarh Muslim University is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Radiotherapy Technician position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Radiotherapy Technician role will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 19,350/- per month. This is a temporary position at AMU.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must possess a Bachelor of Radiation Therapy Technology (BRTT) or B.Sc. in Radiation Therapy. Alternatively, a Diploma in Radiation Therapy with 3 years of relevant experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Radiotherapy Technician job at AMU?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and submit it to the Department of Radiotherapy, JNMC, AMU, Aligarh by the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is this a permanent or temporary job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Radiotherapy Technician position at Aligarh Muslim University is on a temporary basis.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Radiotherapy Technician in this recruitment drive by Aligarh Muslim University.

faq.question: Q7. Where should I send the application form?
faq.answer: The completed application form along with all required documents should be submitted to the Office of the Department of Radiotherapy, JNMC, AMU, Aligarh.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations for this post. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: Q9. What documents do I need to submit with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates must submit self-attested copies of all relevant documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and identity proof.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. Online applications will not be accepted.
